tools.name: send_fax
tools.description: Send a fax to a US or Canada phone number. Accepts PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, JPEG, TXT files (max 10) as base64-encoded content.

tools.name: check_fax_status
tools.description: Check the delivery status of a previously sent fax using its job_id. No authentication required — the job_id is the unforgeable token.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get the current page balance and dollar amount balance for the authenticated account.

tools.name: list_sent_faxes
tools.description: List faxes previously sent by the authenticated account (most recent first). Includes faxes sent via MCP, REST API, and the prepaid web form. Free anonymous sends are not included.

tools.name: purchase_credits
tools.description: Start a prepaid credit purchase. If the request is authenticated, credits will be loaded into the authenticated account after PayPal payment. If the request is not authenticated, provide email and name to create a new prepaid account (or load credits into an existing one with the same email). Return

tools.name: send_free_fax
tools.description: Send a free fax to a US or Canada number (no account required). Limited to 3 pages total and 2 sends per email/IP per day. Returns a job_id immediately, but the fax does NOT send until the sender clicks a confirmation link emailed to sender_email. The daily-limit check happens at click time, not at

tools.name: list_supported_formats
tools.description: List all supported file formats that can be faxed.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: purchase_credits, send_free_fax · Private data: send_fax, check_fax_status, send_free_fax, list_supported_formats · Public sink: send_fax, purchase_credits, send_free_fax.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: purchase_credits, send_free_fax · Private data: send_fax, check_fax_status, send_free_fax, list_supported_formats · Public sink: send_fax, purchase_credits, send_free_fax

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
